description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly white hard shell and a single, wide, vertical gold stripe running from front to back. The front faceplate is angular and robust, with two prominent circular vent structures and a reinforced chin guard, giving it a militaristic, sci-fi appearance. Both sides of the helmet display intricate mechanical details, including a large, gear-like dial and visible venting, suggesting advanced functionality or communication equipment. The lower portion is wrapped in a textured, tan fabric resembling a tactical scarf or balaclava, which adds to its utilitarian look and provides additional neck protection. The surface of the helmet shows signs of wear, with subtle scuffs and dirt, indicating use in rugged urban environments. There are no visible brand logos, but the helmet's design is highly distinctive and purpose-built for protection and communication.
description: A white, futuristic tactical helmet with a gold stripe, mechanical side details, and a tan fabric neck wrap, showing signs of urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the gold stripe running centrally along the top and the full extent of the tan fabric neck wrap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large gear-like dial, venting, and mechanical details integrated into the helmet's shell.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the angular faceplate, dual circular vents, reinforced chin guard, and the gold stripe centered above the visor area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible mechanical components and the continuation of the gold stripe.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large circular vents on the front faceplate, with additional slotted vents on both sides near the jawline; all vents are symmetrically placed and moderately sized.
attribute_graphic_design: Single wide gold stripe running front to back over a white shell; no additional graphics or motifs.
